rationale: Observation base_record_id route_m15-sbs matches the existing registry record route_m15-sbs exactly (same route_id M15, route_type Select Bus Service, borough Manhattan, service_variant sbs). Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id; no different target applies.

Observation base_record_id route_m15-local-2010-09-14 matches the existing registry record route_m15-local-2010-09-14 exactly (same route_id M15, route_label M15 Local, route_type Local, borough Manhattan, service_variant local). Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.

Observation base_record_id route_m15-limited-2010-06-09 matches the existing registry record route_m15-limited-2010-06-09 exactly (same route_id M15, route_label M15 Limited, route_type Limited, borough Manhattan, service_variant limited_stop). Observation already resolves to its own base_record_id.

Observation matches base_record_id entity_nypd: same entity 'New York Police Department (NYPD)'. Registry record entity_nypd has entity_name 'New York City Police Department'. The base identity is already correct.

Observation matches base_record_id entity_manhattan-community-board-6: this is Manhattan Community Board 6 Transportation Committee (source is 1st/2nd Ave SBS CB6 presentation). Registry record has entity_name 'Manhattan Community Board 6', entity_type 'community_board'. The base identity is already correct; not confused with Bronx Community Board 6 (separate registry records).

proposed_relations.description: Both records refer to the M15 Select Bus Service implementation on First and Second Avenues in Manhattan. The project_first-second-ave-sbs record captures planning-phase sources (2009-2011), while project_m15-sbs-first-second-aves captures the post-implementation progress report (November 2011). The observation's source document explicitly names the M15 SBS and confirms operational status as of October 10, 2010.

evidence_refs.source_quote: First Avenue/Second Avenue Select Bus Service Community Board 6 Transportation Committee Meeting May 2, 2011
M15 Select Bus Service launched October 10, 2010
- Over 10 miles of dedicated bus lanes - NYPD and camera enforcement - off-board fare payment - revised station spacing - low-floor, three-door buses

rationale: The observation's base_record_id project_first-second-ave-sbs already exists in the registry and is the correct identity match — the observation resolves to the same First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project. Per rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' (no link to a different record needed). A relation is proposed to project_m15-sbs-first-second-aves, which is a separate registry record for the same M15 SBS project drawn from a different source (the November 2011 progress report).
